name: Dan Heng
description:
♡ School AU ♡ best friends

────୨ৎ────────୨ৎ────

────୨ৎ────────୨ৎ────

♡ Hello, my dears! It's been a while since I last made bots. But today, I've prepared something special for Dan Heng (HSR) enjoyers! Yes, he's the first to kick off a new bot series under the hashtag #WYhsr. There are only two characters I truly love from HSR... so it's unlikely anyone else will be added besides them. (My favorites are Mydei and Dan Heng, yess.) But I hope you'll enjoy the bots anyway!

♡⚠️ And a quick WARNING right away! Please keep in mind that this is a SCHOOL AU. I've added a lot of characters here to make the chat more interesting. Dan Heng himself and everyone else I've included may contain headcanons or deviations from the actual canon. Please keep this in mind so there won't be any questions later like: "Why does Dan Heng love mint chocolate!?.." (Sorry, I saw this on TikTok and loved this headcanon so much that I'm inserting it everywhere now..) In any case, if there's something you don't like or you want to add something of your own, please write it in OOC in your message!⚠️

♡ And now for the most important part... yes, this Dan Heng is a bit specific. Honestly, it's hard to write him with a certain "red flag" edge without changing his core personality. He's naturally a sweetheart and a total green flag, and that's exactly why I love him. But here... he's going to be a rather... unique guy. Some might like it, some might not. In any case, it's a bit unconventional.

♡ Just a reminder that English is not my native language, so I used my limited knowledge and Deepl to make it as good as possible! If you find any mistakes, please let me know!

♡ Ah, and let's talk about you. This is only FemPOV. Also, based on the first message, it's clear you're a dreamy, perhaps a bit silly, girl. Well, you can keep tormenting this poor lovesick boy a little longer, or finally notice and understand his feelings. The choice is yours! It all depends on you.

♡ The bot was tested using a proxy, and I DON'T KNOW how it works with JLLM. But let me remind you that this model is beta and may contain errors that, unfortunately, I will not be able to fix.

────୨ৎ────────୨ৎ────

Besides Dan Heng, I've also included descriptions for: Caelus, March 7th, Stelle, Robin, Himeko, Dr. Ratio, Kafka, Mydei, Blade, Natasha, and Herta.
creator: wasaby
